title: Create-ive
description: A large modpack made around Create with a lot of Create Add-ons and building mods while being moderately optimized.
body:
# Create-ive Modpack

### Tips for New Users

When opening or creating your first world, you will be asked to configure Axiom and Simple Voice Chat.
Configuring Axiom is just a few button clicks and can be skipped, and setting up Simple Voice Chat asks you a few more questions but isn't too complicated.

All the mods and resourcepacks this modpack requires consume a lot of memory and, with the default amount of allocated memory, can crash a lot. To fix that, you should adjust the allocated memory settings immediately after installing the modpack to about 8192 (2^13) like this:

![Recommended memory settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1446e4aeabbbfc3197b02adb27adc11b36bc2093.png)
*This option is available in the instance's options.*

### If you see a bug...

**If the bug is related to a specific mod**, report it to that mod's developers, and **if it's a bug with the modpack**, DM me on discord: `@minetomek`.

## Recommended Resourcepack Order

<details>
<summary>Expand</summary>

**Installing (not updating to) version 1.3.0 or later automatically sets the resourcepack preferences to the recommended order!**

There isn't one required order because most packs won't override themselves. However, a few combinations should be in a specific order.\
*A lower number next to the pack name means a higher position*

### Create UI Packs:

They should be in this order:

1. [Moonsu] Better GUI Create Style for Tom's Simple Storage
2. Tom's Create Storage
3. Create Darkmode

It also should be placed above *Unique Dark*.

### Continuity's Packs:

They should be in this order:

1. Glass Pane Culling Fix
2. Default Connected Textures

</details>

## Known Issues

<details>
<summary>Expand</summary>

- Shaders can cause occasional problems with rendering UI
- Shaders can cause wakes (from, well… Wakes) to render incorrectly

</details>
